summary: Implemented differentiated backoff strategy for rate limit errors (429) vs transient errors: 15s/30s/60s exponential backoff for 429s (respecting rate limit reset windows) vs 1s/2s/3s for other transient errors. Improved diagnostic logging by moving response logging before JSON parsing so failures are captured, saving failed responses with _error_ prefix, and preserving raw text and headers when JSON parsing fails to reveal actual OpenRouter responses.
